generated_exposure.exposure_text: Our allies are taking advantage of us. While we're over here footing the bill for collective defense, they're cutting corners on their commitments. Remember when Germany delayed their defense spending? That's not partnership—that's exploitation. We need to wake up and demand they pull their weight or we pull our support. #NationalSecurity #AllianceCommitment
